title: unimsg.ocx
text: unimsg.ocx The unimsg.ocx file is the ActiveX component that allows you to access the Message API Utility. To use this OCX, you must register it. In the Windows Run dialog or Command window, enter the following line: regsvr32.exe UnifaceInstallDir /common/bin/unimsg.ocx Related Links Message API Utility The Message API Utility sends messages to a Uniface application from a non-Uniface Windows application using Uniface's remote postmessage mechanism.
